arn.description: Amazon Resource Name for use in IAM policies and API operations

core_network_arn.description: ARN of the core network associated with the VPN connection

core_network_attachment_arn.description: ARN of the core network attachment linked to the VPN connection

customer_gateway_configuration.description: XML configuration for the customer gateway to establish VPN tunnels

id.description: Unique identifier for the VPN connection resource

preshared_key_arn.description: ARN of the preshared key used for VPN authentication

routes.description: List of routes defined for the VPN connection

tags_all.description: Consolidated tags applied to the VPN connection resource

transit_gateway_attachment_id.description: ID of the attachment linking the VPN to the transit gateway

tunnel1_address.description: Public IP address of the first VPN tunnel

tunnel1_bgp_asn.description: BGP ASN for the first VPN tunnel used in routing

tunnel1_bgp_holdtime.description: BGP hold time for the first VPN tunnel in seconds

tunnel1_cgw_inside_address.description: Internal IP address for the customer gateway on tunnel 1

tunnel1_vgw_inside_address.description: Internal IP address for the virtual gateway on tunnel 1

tunnel2_address.description: Public IP address of the second VPN tunnel

tunnel2_bgp_asn.description: BGP ASN for the second VPN tunnel used in routing

tunnel2_bgp_holdtime.description: BGP hold time for the second VPN tunnel in seconds

tunnel2_cgw_inside_address.description: Internal IP address for the customer gateway on tunnel 2

tunnel2_vgw_inside_address.description: Internal IP address for the virtual gateway on tunnel 2

vgw_telemetry.description: Diagnostic information about the virtual gateway performance
